title: Simple Improved
description: A lightweight modpack,Based on performance optimization for vanilla improvements and better vanilla-playing!
body:
![simple improved](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8439f46d21898aab6177776337edab403f85f90c.png)

# What is this modpack for?
As the name suggests, if you like me are tired of the mods in any other big modpacks but to be passionate the excellent maps from community based on vanilla,then you've come to the right place.

# Introduction
The ultimate goal of this modpack is do every things perfect that should have been done by Mojang but wasn't. it is designed for players who enjoy maps or vanilla. It focuses on vanilla improvements, performance optimization, and the ultimate map-playing experience. It includes more than 60 mods and many high-quality resource packs.,but it clears all obstacles for immersive gameplay. It doesn't add any substantial content (I mean blocks, mobs, structures, bosses, and the like),So you can play it like you play vanilla.However, I have to say, I made this mod pack with a 'just have a try' attitude, so you might notice that there are some unnecessary elements in it (or what could be called 'optional content'). Some of it is harmless, some might come in handy at times, and some may only put a strain on performance.

# Characteristics
- Various practical tools: world map, zoom, text selection,jade,mouse tweaks,dynamic lights and pick up notifier.
- Simple and elegant modern interface.
- Better chat system.
- Immersive visuals, sound effects, and particles
- A extra shoulder surfing.
- Outstanding Optimization:more than double the FPS!
- Vanilla mechanism adjustment.
- It won't deviate too much from vanilla.
- And other more!........

<details>
<summary>Related questions and answers</summary>

<details>
<summary>Why does it only support version XXX?</summary>

- In order to make more maps run on this modpack, I try to use newer versions as much as possible. Since 1.20.1, mods support Forge have gradually decreased, and mods support Neoforge are relatively fewer compared to Fabric.~~Therefore, it may not be possible to port it to Forge.~~
- Considering that some maps require a specific version to play, versions adapted for other versions are currently in development.

</details>

<details>
<summary>So why don't you use the newer 1.21.10?</summary>

  - Found some serious bug when loading 22 mods on 1.21.10-fabic_0.18.1(fabicAPI_0.138.3) while testing the modpack:
1. Trying to open inventory within a few minutes of entering the map will immediately cause the process to become unresponsive.
2. Trying to change perspective within a few minutes of entering the map will immediately cause the process to become unresponsive.
3. Attempting to create a world causes the process to become unresponsive
4. Sometimes resourcepacks embedded in map cannot be loaded
- 1.21.10 has not updated any substantive content compared to 1.21.9, so a map that is compatible with 1.21.10 can theoretically run on 1.21.9.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Will it be updated in the future?</summary>

Of course, I will continue searching in the community for high-quality mods and resourcepacks suitable for this modpack.

</details>

</details>

# Announcement

- Support for version 1.21.9-fabic will be permanently discontinued. Please download other versions.

# Others

- Since Mojang almost completely rewrote all of Minecraft's content in version 1.13, including the command system, maps compatible with 1.12.2 and earlier may not work properly in higher versions. So a version compatible with 1.12.2-forge is being developed,but that would take a long time because I'm not familiar with the mods of the older version.
- This modpack differs from other modpacks focused on performance optimization. In addition to performance improvements, it requires adding quite a few other mods, so its performance optimization may not be as good as other modpacks of the same type._If you really need it, you can consider downloading an optimized JDK for example:[Azul Zulu JDK](https://www.azul.com/downloads/)_.
- _Additionally, if you are a Chinese player, it is recommended to use [Plain Craft Launcher Community Editionl(PCL CE)](https://pclce-web.demo.fis.ink/)._
